summary: Good audience‑type recording that captures an ecstatic crowd and a memorable first box of rain in years
review: The reviewer attended the show and recalls it as their first ‘Box of Rain’ experience in years, highlighting the wildly enthusiastic crowd throughout most of the set. No specific comments about the audio fidelity are given, but the positive rating suggests the recording is at least listenable.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single 4‑star review; praise focuses on crowd energy rather than sound quality, so rating reflects overall positive impression with limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit remarks about clarity or mix; reviewer’s positive star rating implies the recording is acceptable for listening.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer emphasizes high crowd excitement throughout most of the performance, indicating a consistently engaging show.
